allow: Bash(xcodebuild -workspace TheCliqueApp.xcworkspace -scheme TheCliqueApp -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -sdk iphoneos build)

Bash(xcodebuild -workspace TheCliqueApp.xcworkspace -scheme TheCliqueApp -configuration Release -destination 'id=ACAB04A3-9FBA-4B02-8252-0FD4E45E3380' -sdk iphonesimulator build)
